blended.narrative: Mont Orford is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,060 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
